common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
common.name: Name

errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use
errors.lastAdmin: Cannot deactivate or demote the last administrator
errors.passwordShort: Password too short — at least 8 characters
errors.passwordRequired: A password is required for a new user
errors.yearArchived: That academic year is archived — its sessions and money records cannot be changed.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.duplicate: Duplicate value — the QID, employee no. or teacher is already used by another record.
errors.invalid_qid: The QID must be exactly 11 digits.
errors.leaveOverlap: This employee already has approved or pending leave overlapping this period.
errors.alreadyDecided: This request has already been decided.
errors.monthHasRun: A run already exists for this month.
errors.runPaid: A paid run cannot be deleted.
errors.noHireDate: This employee has no hire date.
errors.alreadySettled: An end-of-service settlement already exists for this employee.
errors.invalid_folder: The folder id is not valid.
errors.invalid_sa: Invalid JSON — make sure it is a service-account key containing client_email and private_key.
errors.notConfigured: Enter the folder id and key and save first.
errors.invalidParent: Invalid parent account — it must be of the same type.
errors.duplicateCode: This account code is already in use.
errors.systemAccount: This is a system account — it can be deactivated but not deleted.
errors.accountInUse: An account with entries or sub-accounts cannot be deleted — deactivate it instead.
errors.unbalanced: The entry is not balanced — total debit must equal total credit.
errors.notManual: Auto-posted entries can only be removed with their source document.
errors.notEnabled: The accounting module is not enabled.
errors.supplierInUse: A supplier with expenses cannot be deleted — deactivate it instead.
errors.bookExhausted: This book has no leaves left — create a new one.
errors.badTransition: That status change is not allowed from the trip's current status.
errors.depositBeforeReceived: Deposit date is before the received date.
errors.clearanceBeforeDeposit: Clearance date is before the deposit date.
errors.alreadyCheque: This expense is already linked to a cheque.
errors.plateTaken: This plate is already registered to another vehicle.
errors.vehicleInUse: A vehicle assigned to a driver cannot be deleted — deactivate it instead.
errors.driverExists: This employee is already registered as a driver.
errors.invalidShift: The shift end must be after the shift start — set both, or leave both blank.
errors.notADriver: This employee is not registered as a driver yet — add them to the drivers register first.
errors.notRunning: That trip is not running, so a location cannot be recorded for it.
errors.alreadyLinked: That record already has a login.

common.errorGeneric: Could not save — please check the details
common.nameEnHint: Optional — shown when the interface is in English.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system
auth.locked: Too many failed attempts — try again in 10 minutes

sessions.title: Daily Sessions
sessions.priceAuto: Price is calculated automatically from grade level and location
sessions.searchPlaceholder: Search by student, teacher or date…
sessions.subject: Subject
sessions.subjectHint: Optional — shown on the booking card when set.

group.title: Group booking
group.noGradeWarn: {n} selected have no grade level — set a grade override or they will be skipped.
group.tooMany: Too many sessions in one batch — reduce students, weekdays, or weeks.

calendar.title: Schedule
calendar.subtitle: Drag to reschedule, drag the bottom edge to change duration, click an empty slot to book.

checkin.title: Check-in / Check-out
checkin.subtitle: Record today in one tap — mark all present, then fix the exceptions.
checkin.locationFar: You are {m} m from the saved home ({max} m allowed)
checkin.locationNoHome: No home location saved for this student
checkin.manualHint: The code printed under the student card.

scanErrors.noSessionToday: No session for this student today
scanErrors.noGradeLevel: Student has no grade level set

checkin.reviewHint: Completed by the system after their end time.
checkin.cardsSubtitle: Print and hand these out so students can check in by scanning.
checkin.noCards: No cards yet — press "Generate missing cards".
checkin.scanSubtitle: Hold the student card up to the camera — attendance records itself.
checkin.noDayTeachers: No teacher recorded a session on this day.
checkin.walkInFlagHint: No session today? One is created without a teacher for you to assign later.

cameraErrors.insecure: The camera only works over a secure connection (HTTPS).
cameraErrors.unsupported: This browser cannot open the camera.
cameraErrors.notFound: No camera was found on this device.
cameraErrors.failed: The camera could not be started.

cameraHints.insecure: Open the page over https:// or from localhost, then try again.
cameraHints.unsupported: Use a recent Chrome, Edge or Safari, or type the code below.
cameraHints.denied: Allow camera access from the lock icon next to the address bar, then reload.
cameraHints.notFound: Connect a camera or use a device that has one, or type the code below.
cameraHints.failed: Another app may be using the camera. Close it and reload, or type the code.

checkin.fallbackDecoder: This browser uses a fallback reader — scanning may be a little slower. Hold the card close and steady.

students.title: Students
students.homeCodeHint: Short location code (zone/street/building or compound name) shown to the teacher on the planner for home sessions.
students.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or grade…
students.assignedTeachersHint: Teachers who teach this student this year — they appear first when booking.
students.studyLocationHint: New sessions auto-price by grade and study location; each session can still override it.
students.gradeYearHint: Actual school year (1–12), used to group same-grade students

map.title: Pick location on map
map.hint: Click the map to drop a pin, or drag it to fine-tune.
map.noResultsHint: No match found — try a nearby street or area, or click the map to drop a pin.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.searchPlaceholder: Search by teacher name or phone…
teachers.earningsModeHint: Salary only, commission only, or both.
teachers.paymentModeHint: How often the payout is cut.
teachers.subjectsHint: Subjects the teacher teaches — shown when booking.
teachers.homeHint: Setting a pin includes this teacher in transport planning: rides start and end here.

guardians.title: Guardians
guardians.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or email…

payments.title: Payments
payments.searchPlaceholder: Search by student or receipt no…
payments.amountPrefilledHint: Pre-filled with the outstanding balance — edit it for a part payment.
payments.nothingOutstanding: Nothing outstanding — this student has no unpaid lessons.
payments.errorOverSession: One lesson has been allocated more than it owes.
payments.errorOverPayment: The split adds up to more than the payment.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.supplierHint: Optional — the register appears in the accounting module when enabled.

payroll.title: Teacher dues
payroll.advancesHint: Money already advanced, deducted from the payout.
payroll.earningsExcluded: {part} is not counted for this teacher under their earnings basis.

settings.title: Settings
settings.teacherCanConfirm: Let teachers confirm their own sessions
settings.teacherCanConfirmHint: When on, a teacher can mark their own draft as taught from their portal.
settings.earningsIntro: Choose how teacher dues are worked out: a fixed salary, commission on what is collected, or both.
settings.earningsDefaultHint: Applies to every teacher without a mode of their own.
settings.earningsApplyAllHint: Overwrites each active teacher's own mode. "Follow default" clears their override instead.
settings.earningsOverrideCount: {n} of {total} teachers have their own mode.

integrations.keepKeyHint: A key is already saved. Leave blank to keep it.
integrations.advancedHelp: Adjust these to match your provider's API docs — no code change needed.

planner.title: Daily planner
planner.subtitle: Plan each teacher's day as drafts, then confirm what was actually taught.
planner.timeAutoHint: Time is auto-suggested after the teacher's last session — editable.
planner.settingsHint: Used to suggest and compact session times.
planner.moveHint: Time is suggested from the target teacher's schedule — adjust before saving.
planner.dragHint: Drag any draft onto another teacher's row to move it.
planner.templatesHint: Recurring weekly sessions. "Generate day" turns them into drafts for the shown day.
planner.copiedNone: Nothing to copy from last week
planner.printTeachersHint: Teachers with sessions today are selected automatically.
planner.printExtraSlotsHint: Columns to fill in by hand. Zero = used columns only.
planner.printSummary: {teachers} teachers across {columns} columns will be printed.
planner.timetableDisclaimer: This timetable is a plan and is subject to change.

timetableErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
timetableErrors.invalid: The date range is not valid.

users.keepPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password

data.title: Data import & export
data.hint: Export any table to Excel, or download a blank template and import it once filled.
data.seedHint: Generates demo data and restores grade levels, price matrix and expense categories.
data.wipeHint: Deletes every record, keeping administrator accounts and centre settings.
data.wipeWarning: This cannot be undone. Students, teachers, sessions, payments, expenses and all logs will be deleted.
data.wipeKeeps: Kept: administrator accounts, centre profile and logo, integration settings.
data.seedRangeError: The value in “{field}” exceeds the allowed maximum ({max}).

availability.title: Weekly working hours
availability.hint: Used to warn when a session is booked outside the teacher's hours — advisory only, it never blocks saving.
availability.emptyHint: No working hours set — the teacher counts as always available and no warnings appear.
availability.copyToWeek: Copy to the rest of the week
availability.invalidRange: The end must be after the start

conflicts.title: Scheduling warnings
conflicts.teacherBusy: The teacher already has a session with {name} at this time
conflicts.teacherBusyPlain: The teacher already has another session at this time
conflicts.studentBusy: The student already has a session with {name} at this time
conflicts.studentBusyPlain: The student already has another session at this time
conflicts.advisory: Advisory only — you can still save.
conflicts.noAutoFix: No automatic fix — adjust the time or teacher by hand.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Attendance, revenue, packages, payroll and outstanding balances.

portal.parentSubtitle: Your children's sessions, balance, receipts and packages.
portal.confirmDisabledHint: Sessions are confirmed by centre staff.
portal.noChildren: No students are linked to your account. Please contact the centre.
portal.createLoginHint: Creates a portal-only account. Hand the password over so they can change it later.

errors.emailTaken: That email is already in use
errors.alreadyLinked: A login already exists for this record

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Track enquiries from first contact through to enrolment.
leads.dragHint: Drag a card to another column to change its status.
leads.trialHint: Booked as a zero-price draft: visible on the calendar and planner, invisible to the ledger.
leads.convertHint: Creates a student record linked to this lead.
leads.convertHintWithTrials: Promotes the existing trial record to an enrolled student, keeping its history.
leads.guardianOptional: Optional — a guardian record is created when a name is given.

errors.alreadyConverted: This lead has already been converted

attendanceSettings.title: Attendance settings
attendanceSettings.pickSessionLabel: Show all of today's sessions and let me pick
attendanceSettings.pickSessionHint: When off, the scan records against the session nearest to now.

walkInModes.FLAG: Create one without a teacher and flag it
walkInModes.ASSIGN: Create one with the student's usual teacher
walkInModes.ASK: Refuse and ask staff to book

walkInHints.FLAG: Fastest while staying in control — no payroll moves before assignment.
walkInHints.ASSIGN: Uses the assigned teacher only when there is exactly one; otherwise left unassigned.
walkInHints.ASK: Shows an error at the kiosk so staff can book the session.

attendanceSettings.graceHoursHint: A session left unmarked this long after it ends is completed by the system and flagged for review.

years.title: Academic years
years.intro: Archiving a year freezes its sessions, payments, payouts and expenses. Student and teacher records stay editable, and reports and statements keep working.
years.rolloverHint: Creates the new year, makes it current, and archives the previous one in one step.
years.archiveWarning: {n} money and attendance records will be frozen — still viewable, no longer editable.

errors.cannotArchiveCurrent: Cannot archive the current year — set another one current first
errors.cannotCurrentArchived: An archived year cannot be current
errors.cannotDeleteArchived: Cannot delete an archived year — unarchive it first

hr.title: Human resources
hr.subtitle: Staff register, documents and expiry alerts — everyone at the centre, not only teachers.
hr.qidHint: 11 digits. Leave blank if not issued yet.
hr.visaHint: Used while no QID has been issued.
hr.linkedTeacherHint: Link when this employee also teaches — one payslip combines salary and commission.
hr.basicSalaryHint: End-of-service gratuity is calculated on basic only.
hr.terminateHint: The record is not deleted — it becomes Terminated and leave accrual stops. Documents and payslips remain.

leave.title: Leave
leave.subtitle: Staff leave balances and requests — per Qatar labour law.
leave.adjustHint: Positive credits the balance (opening/carry-forward), negative debits it.
leave.calendarDaysNote: Annual leave is counted in calendar days.

runs.title: Payroll runs
runs.subtitle: Generate a monthly run for all staff, settle it, and print signable payslips.
runs.employeesHint: Everyone is selected by default — a normal payroll run covers all staff.
runs.noEmployees: No employees yet — add them in HR first.
runs.monthHasRunWarning: A run already exists for {month}. Press "Generate anyway" if this is a corrective or off-cycle run.
runs.runSubtitle: {n} payslips — review, print for signatures, then settle.
runs.signEmployee: Employee signature — I received the amount above
runs.printFooter: Payslips for {month} — one page per employee, for signature.
runs.wpsBlocked: The WPS file cannot be generated — complete the missing data:
runs.wpsBlockedHint: Establishment and payer details live in Settings; employee details (QID/visa, bank, IBAN, basic salary above zero) live in HR.

wpsIssues.employerEID: Employer EID invalid — set it in Settings.
wpsIssues.payer: Set the payer in Settings: EID or QID (exactly one).
wpsIssues.payerBankShortName: Choose the payer bank in Settings.
wpsIssues.records: No employee-linked payslips on this run.
wpsIssues.qid: Enter a QID (11 digits) or a visa ID — exactly one.
wpsIssues.name: Name missing or over 70 characters.
wpsIssues.bankShortName: Pick the employee's bank from the list.
wpsIssues.account: Enter a valid IBAN for the employee.
wpsIssues.basicSalary: Basic salary must be above zero.

eos.title: End of service — {name}
eos.unusedLeaveHint: Check the leave page — encashed at the basic daily rate.
eos.needsHireDate: Cannot compute without a hire date — add it on the employee record first.
eos.unpaidNote: On save, the server subtracts approved unpaid-leave days from the service period.
eos.terminatesWarning: Saving permanently ends the employment and records the settlement.

wps.intro: Details for the Salary Information File (SIF) uploaded to the bank: the establishment ID from the registration card and the account salaries are paid from.
wps.employerEIDHint: 7 or 8 digits from the establishment registration card.
wps.payerHint: Usually the same as the Employer EID. Leave blank if the payer is an individual.
wps.payerQidHint: Only when the payer is an individual — one of the two, never both.
wps.basicFloorHint: e.g. 2000. For commission-paid staff: this amount is declared as Basic in the WPS file and taken out of the commission; the remainder shows as Extra Income (bonus). Net pay is untouched — it only relabels between two columns, and if the month's earnings are below the amount, the whole sum is declared as basic with nothing added. Leave empty to disable.

siteSettings.intro: What a visitor sees at the root URL, and the centre page's texts. Empty fields fall back to the defaults.
siteSettings.publicHomeHint: What the site's main address shows to visitors.

site.metaRootDescription: A complete management system for education centres — scheduling, attendance, billing, WPS payroll, and HR.
site.metaErpTitle: EDU ERP — Education Centre Management System
site.heroTitleDefault: High-quality education in a motivating, supportive environment
site.heroTextDefault: We walk with our students through carefully designed academic programmes and experienced teachers, helping every family reach its goals with confidence.
site.aboutTextDefault: Our centre was founded to be a trusted reference for families seeking quality education and individual attention, through a balanced curriculum and continuous follow-up with parents.
site.valueTeachersText: A hand-picked team of highly experienced teachers.
site.valueProgramsText: Modern curricula and complete programmes for every stage.
site.valueResultsText: A proven record of success and academic excellence.
site.valueFollowUpText: Regular follow-up and performance reports for parents.
site.stagesSubtitle: Programmes designed for every school stage
site.registerSubtitle: Register your interest and our admissions team will help pick the right programme.
site.registerDone: We received your request — our team will contact you soon.
site.registerInvalid: Check the name and phone number (at least 8 digits).
site.registerLocked: We received several requests from your device — we will be in touch, or message us on WhatsApp.
site.erpHeroTitle: One system that runs your entire education centre
site.erpHeroText: From session scheduling and QR attendance to billing, WPS-compliant payroll, and HR — in Arabic and English.
site.erpFeaturesSubtitle: Real modules working today — not promises

erpFeatureText.planner: Plan each teacher's day with drag-and-drop and confirm in one click.
erpFeatureText.calendar: Week and day views with drag-to-reschedule and click-to-book.
erpFeatureText.attendance: A QR card per student, camera scanning, and GPS home check-in.
erpFeatureText.billing: A4 and thermal receipts, statements, and automatic reminders.
erpFeatureText.packages: Prepaid hour packages with automatic per-session deduction.
erpFeatureText.payroll: Monthly bulk runs, signable payslips, and a bank-ready SIF file.
erpFeatureText.hr: Staff register, Qatar labour-law leave, and end-of-service gratuity.
erpFeatureText.portals: Parents see sessions and payments; teachers see schedule and dues.
erpFeatureText.crm: A leads board with trial sessions and one-click conversion.
erpFeatureText.reports: Revenue, expenses, monthly trends, and Excel export for every table.
erpFeatureText.bilingual: A fully bidirectional interface with smart Arabic search.
erpFeatureText.security: Fine-grained roles, a financial audit log, and daily backups.

site.erpCtaText: Sign in to the system, or get to know the centre.

backups.serverIntro: A daily dump at 03:00 on the server, promoted weekly (Mondays) and monthly (1st). Download any copy here.
backups.noBackups: No backups yet — the first one is created tonight.
backups.guide1: Open console.cloud.google.com, create (or reuse) a project, and enable the Google Drive API.
backups.guide2: Under IAM → Service Accounts create a service account, then under Keys create and download a JSON key.
backups.guide3: Create a folder in Google Drive for the backups.
backups.guide4: Share that folder with the service account's email ({email}) as Editor — the step everyone forgets.
backups.guide5: Copy the folder id from its URL (after /folders/), paste the JSON key below, save, then test.
backups.guideEmailPlaceholder: shown here once the key is pasted
backups.saJsonHint: Stored in the database and never shown again. Leave empty to keep the current key, or clear both fields to disable.
backups.testOk: Upload succeeded — look for an edu-erp-test file in the folder.

accounting.moduleIntro: Chart of accounts, double-entry journal, trial balance and P&L reports. Enabling seeds the default chart of accounts and auto-posts payments, expenses and payroll to the ledger.
accounting.enableHint: Turning it off hides the module and pauses auto-posting without deleting any entries — everything resumes when re-enabled.
accounting.accountsSubtitle: The centre's financial accounts — locked 🔒 accounts are system accounts and cannot be deleted.
accounting.codeHint: Digits only: 1000s assets, 2000s liabilities, 3000s equity, 4000s income, 5000s expenses.
accounting.journalSubtitle: Double-entry records auto-posted from payments, expenses and payroll, plus manual entries.
accounting.reportsSubtitle: Trial balance and profit & loss over any period.
accounting.statementSubtitle: Account activity with a running balance.
accounting.backfillHint: Posts payments, expenses and paid payslips from the chosen date into the journal. Safe to re-run — anything already posted is skipped.
accounting.openingBalanceHint: Opening balances (cash/bank) are recorded as one manual entry against equity account 3000.
accounting.templateHint: Field positions in millimetres from the leaf's top-left — calibrated once per bank book using the test print.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.subtitle: Vendor register linked to expenses and outgoing cheques.

cheques.title: Cheques
cheques.subtitle: Incoming and outgoing cheque register with lifecycle and cash-flow forecast.
cheques.searchPlaceholder: Search by cheque no. or party…
cheques.bookHint: The next leaf number is consumed automatically on issue.
cheques.forecastHint: Light bar = gross due; dark bar = confidence-weighted by each cheque's status.
cheques.agingHint: Uncollected incoming amounts by how far past their due date they are.
cheques.printHint: Place the cheque leaf at the top of the tray and print — positions are calibrated in millimetres from the accounting settings.

transport.moduleIntro: Plans rides that move teachers and students between homes and the centre, allocates drivers by distance and the time left before the next lesson, and tracks trips on the map.
transport.enableHint: Turning it off hides the module and stops trip generation without deleting anything — everything returns when re-enabled.
transport.centreLocationHint: The start and end of most trips — set it once on the map.
transport.etaHint: Times are computed locally from straight-line distance × a detour factor ÷ speed — no address ever leaves your server. The estimate is approximate (±20%).
transport.bufferHint: Margin to arrive before the lesson starts.
transport.maxDeadheadHint: Kilometres allowed to reach a pickup.
transport.pingDaysHint: Older tracking points are deleted automatically.
transport.trackingVisibilityHint: This is staff location data — share it as narrowly as possible.
transport.passengersHint: Which passengers the planner arranges transport for. Teachers opt in by having a home pin; students by the transport switch on their record.

subjects.title: Subjects
subjects.name: Subject
subjects.manageHint: Subjects that can be chosen when booking a lesson.

vehicles.title: Vehicles
vehicles.subtitle: The fleet the centre can dispatch, and the papers that must stay valid.
vehicles.expiryAlert: {count, plural, =1 {# vehicle document} other {# vehicle documents}} expired or expiring within {days} days
vehicles.searchPlaceholder: Search by plate, make or model…

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.subtitle: Staff cleared to drive, their licence, shift and usual vehicle.
drivers.shiftHint: Leave both blank if this driver has no fixed shift — they will be considered available all day.
drivers.licenceAlert: {count, plural, =1 {# driver licence} other {# driver licences}} expired or expiring within {days} days
drivers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, licence or plate…

transportPlanner.title: Transport planner
transportPlanner.subtitle: Generate the day's rides, review the proposed driver for each, then approve.
transportPlanner.problems: {count, plural, =1 {# ride needs attention} other {# rides need attention}}
transportPlanner.empty: Nothing on the board for this day. Generate proposals to plan it.
transportPlanner.noCentre: Set the centre location on the map first (Settings → Transport module) — every trip to or from the centre depends on it.
transportPlanner.aiBriefingFailed: Could not produce a briefing — is the AI module configured?
transportPlanner.onTheWay: On the way — pick up a teacher

trips.title: Trips
trips.subtitle: Every planned and completed journey.
trips.searchPlaceholder: Search by passenger, driver, plate or stop…

driverApp.title: My trips
driverApp.noTrips: No trips assigned to you today.
driverApp.trackingConsent: While a trip is running your location is shared with the centre so they can see where the vehicle is. It stops when you complete the trip or leave this screen.
driverApp.locationDenied: Location permission was denied — the trip still works, the centre just cannot see the vehicle.
driverApp.noGeolocation: This device cannot share a location.
driverApp.needsHttps: Location sharing needs a secure (https) connection.

transportMap.title: Live map
transportMap.subtitle: The day's routes: each trip's suggested path, and where the vehicles actually are.
transportMap.live: {count, plural, =0 {No vehicles running} =1 {# vehicle running} other {# vehicles running}}
transportMap.noneRunning: No trips are on the road at the moment.
transportMap.plannedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No trips planned} =1 {# trip planned} other {# trips planned}}
transportMap.nonePlanned: No trips planned for this day. Generate them on the transport planner.

transportCosts.title: Fuel & maintenance
transportCosts.subtitle: What the fleet costs to run. Every entry creates an expense.
transportCosts.odometerHint: Record the odometer at every fill-up — fuel economy can only be worked out between two readings.
transportCosts.postsToExpenses: Each entry creates an expense in the transport category, so fleet running costs appear in the P&L with everything else.
transportCosts.noVehicles: Add a vehicle first — there is nothing to log costs against yet.

transportReports.title: Fleet reports
transportReports.subtitle: Running cost, distance and how hard each driver and vehicle worked.
transportReports.estimateNote: Distances come from the planner's estimates, so every figure derived from them is approximate.
transportReports.onTimeBasis: Punctuality is measured over {count, plural, =1 {# stop} other {# stops}} where the driver recorded an arrival.

expiringDocs.title: Documents & expiry
expiringDocs.subtitle: Every employee and vehicle document that has lapsed, expires within {days} days, or has no expiry recorded.
expiringDocs.allClear: Nothing expiring. Every document on file is valid.
expiringDocs.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, plate or number…

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Saved rosters (courses) with a per-student agreed price
groups.name: Name
groups.subject: Subject
groups.defaultPriceHint: Used for members with no individual price
groups.priceHelp: Leave blank to use the group default or the price matrix
groups.noSessionsYet: No sessions booked from this group yet — load it in group booking to book one.

hoverCard.subject: Subject
hoverCard.noPin: No home pin set — add it in the student profile

tripPrompt.title: Plan a trip?
tripPrompt.text: {n, plural, one {# home session has} other {# home sessions have}} no trip planned yet.
tripPrompt.result: Proposed {created} trip(s); {unassigned} could not be assigned. Review them in the transport planner.
tripPrompt.failed: Could not plan trips — is the transport module enabled?

ai.moduleIntro: Connects the centre to an AI provider for the management assistant, automatic name translation, and plan briefings. Trip routing stays deterministic — no AI is used for allocation. Paste one API key from whichever provider you choose; you can switch any time.
ai.providerHint: DeepSeek and Kimi are low-cost with good Arabic; custom accepts any OpenAI-compatible URL
ai.apiKeyHint: Stored on the server only; never shown again after saving
ai.apiKeyStored: A key is stored ({masked}). Leave blank to keep it.
ai.autoTranslateHint: When on, newly added students/teachers/guardians get an English spelling filled in automatically; you can always edit it.
ai.assistantRoles: Who can use the AI assistant
ai.assistantRolesHint: The assistant answers questions from centre data (revenue, balances, schedules). Admin always has access.
ai.translateFailed: Translation failed — check the AI settings
ai.floatingChat: Show a floating assistant bubble on every page
ai.floatingChatHint: A chat panel slides in from the side — no need to open it from the menu. Shown only to roles allowed below.

assistant.title: AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Ask anything about the centre — revenue, balances, schedules, transport
assistant.empty: Ask a question about the centre's data. Answers come from live records via read-only queries.
assistant.placeholder: Ask about revenue, a student's balance, today's sessions…
assistant.failed: The assistant could not answer — try again.
assistant.notConfigured: The AI module is not configured yet — add a provider key in Settings.
assistant.disclaimer: Answers are generated from centre data by an AI model and can be imperfect — verify important figures on the reports pages. Questions are recorded in the audit log.

transportManifest.title: Pickups & drop-offs
transportManifest.subtitle: Every teacher taken to a home lesson must have an onward ride — to the next lesson, the centre, or home.
transportManifest.noHomeSessions: No home lessons on this day.

issue.notBroughtHome: Not brought home at the end
